title: Present Simple Tense (Geniş Zaman)
description: İngilizce'nin en temel zamanlarından biridir. Alışkanlıkları, genel doğruları ve rutin olayları anlatmak için kullanılır.
explanation:
**Yapı:** Subject + Verb (+ s/es for he/she/it)

**Olumlu:** I fly every day. / He flies every day.
**Olumsuz:** I do not (don't) fly. / He does not (doesn't) fly.
**Soru:** Do you fly? / Does he fly?

**Kullanım Alanları:**
- Alışkanlıklar: I wake up at 5 AM.
- Genel doğrular: The sun rises in the east.
- Program/Tarifeler: The flight departs at 10:00.

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- The captain checks the instruments before every flight.
- Turkish Airlines flies to 300 destinations.
- The tower controls all air traffic.
aviationContext: Pilotlar, uçuş prosedürlerini ve standart işlemleri anlatırken Present Simple kullanır: 'The pilot checks the weather before departure.'

exercises.question: The pilot ___ (check) the instruments before takeoff.
Turkish Airlines ___ (fly) to New York every day.
The crew ___ (prepare) the cabin before boarding.
Her gün okula giderim.
exercises.answer: I go to school every day.

exercises.question: Pilot her uçuştan önce hava durumunu kontrol eder.
exercises.answer: The pilot checks the weather before every flight.

exercises.question: She fly to London every week.
exercises.answer: She flies to London every week.
I wake up at 6 every morning.

title: Present Continuous Tense (Şimdiki Zaman)
description: Şu anda devam eden eylemleri anlatmak için kullanılır.
explanation:
**Yapı:** Subject + am/is/are + Verb-ing

**Olumlu:** I am flying now. / He is flying now.
**Olumsuz:** I am not flying. / He is not (isn't) flying.
**Soru:** Are you flying? / Is he flying?

**Kullanım Alanları:**
- Şu an olan: I am reading a book right now.
- Geçici durumlar: She is staying at a hotel this week.
- Yakın gelecek planlar: We are flying to Paris tomorrow.

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- We are descending to flight level 250.
- The passengers are boarding the aircraft.
- I am requesting permission for pushback.
aviationContext: Pilotlar anlık durumları bildirirken Present Continuous kullanır: 'We are climbing to flight level 350.'

exercises.question: The airplane ___ (climb) to 35,000 feet right now.
The captain ___ (not/sleep) now. He ___ (fly) the plane.
Yolcular şu an uçağa biniyor.
exercises.answer: The passengers are boarding the aircraft now.

exercises.question: They is waiting at the gate.
exercises.answer: They are waiting at the gate.
The pilot is landing the plane now.

title: Articles: A, An, The (Tanımlıklar)
description: İngilizce'de isimlerin önüne gelen tanımlıklar (articles) ve kullanım kuralları.
explanation:
**A / An (Belirsiz Tanımlık):**
- 'a' ünsüz ses ile başlayan kelimelerden önce: a pilot, a car
- 'an' ünlü ses ile başlayan kelimelerden önce: an airplane, an engineer
- İlk kez bahsedilen veya genel bir şey için kullanılır

**The (Belirli Tanımlık):**
- Daha önce bahsedilen veya bilinen bir şey için: The pilot (belirli bir pilot)
- Tek olan şeyler: the sun, the sky, the captain (of this flight)

**Kullanılmadığı Durumlar:**
- Genel anlamda çoğul isimler: Pilots are brave.
- Ülke isimleri (genellikle): Turkey, England
- Öğünler: I have breakfast at 7.

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- A pilot must check the weather. (herhangi bir pilot / belirli hava durumu)
- The captain is in the cockpit. (bu uçuşun kaptanı)
- An emergency landing is required.
aviationContext: Havacılıkta 'the' çok önemlidir: 'the runway' (belirli pist), 'a runway' (herhangi bir pist), 'the tower' (kontrol kulesi).

exercises.question: He is ___ engineer at Turkish Airlines.
She is ___ pilot. She loves ___ flying.
Pilot kokpitte.
exercises.answer: The pilot is in the cockpit.

exercises.question: I want to be a engineer.
exercises.answer: I want to be an engineer.

exercises.question: A sun is very hot today.
exercises.answer: The sun is very hot today.
The airplane is on the runway.

title: To Be (Olmak Fiili)
description: 'To be' fiili İngilizce'nin en temel ve en çok kullanılan fiilidir.
explanation:
**Olumlu:**
- I am (I'm) a pilot.
- You are (You're) a student.
- He/She/It is (He's) Turkish.
- We/They are (We're) ready.

**Olumsuz:**
- I am not (I'm not) tired.
- He is not (isn't) here.
- They are not (aren't) late.

**Soru:**
- Am I late?
- Is he a pilot?
- Are they ready?

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- I am the captain of this flight.
- The weather is clear.
- We are at cruising altitude.
- Are we cleared for takeoff?
aviationContext: ATC iletişiminde 'to be' sık kullanılır: 'You are cleared for takeoff', 'The runway is clear', 'We are ready for departure'.

exercises.question: She ___ not a passenger. She ___ a crew member.

exercises.answer: The pilot is in the cockpit.

title: Prepositions of Place (Yer Edatları)
description: Nesnelerin ve kişilerin yerini belirtmek için kullanılan edatlar.
explanation:
**Temel Yer Edatları:**
- **in**: içinde → in the cockpit, in the sky, in Turkey
- **on**: üzerinde → on the runway, on the table, on the left
- **at**: noktada → at the airport, at the gate, at home
- **under**: altında → under the wing, under the seat
- **next to**: yanında → next to the window, next to the pilot
- **between**: arasında → between the seats
- **behind**: arkasında → behind the cockpit
- **in front of**: önünde → in front of the terminal
- **above**: yukarısında → above the clouds
- **below**: aşağısında → below the aircraft

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- The life vest is under your seat.
- We are above the clouds.
- The airport is below us.
aviationContext: Yer edatları havacılıkta çok kritiktir: 'Traffic at your 2 o'clock', 'above/below flight level', 'on final approach'.

exercises.question: The life vest is ___ your seat.
Uçak pistte.
exercises.answer: The airplane is on the runway.

exercises.question: Bulutların üzerinde uçuyoruz.
exercises.answer: We are flying above the clouds.

exercises.question: The pilot is on the cockpit.
exercises.answer: The pilot is in the cockpit.
The life vest is under your seat.

title: Simple Past Tense (Geçmiş Zaman) - To Be
description: Geçmişteki durumları ve yerleri belirtmek için 'was/were' kullanılır.
explanation:
**Yapı:** Subject + was/were + Noun/Adjective

**Olumlu:** I/He/She/It was at the airport. You/We/They were ready.
**Olumsuz:** The weather wasn't (was not) good. The passengers weren't (were not) late.
**Soru:** Were you a pilot? Was the flight on time?

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- Yesterday, the weather was very bad. (Dün hava çok kötüydü)
- The airplane was on the runway 10 minutes ago. (Uçak 10 dakika önce pistteydi)
aviationContext: Brifinglerde veya uçuş kontrol raporlarında geçmiş durumlardan bahsederken kullanılır: 'The wind was strong.'

exercises.question: The passengers ___ happy with the flight.
Kaptan dün kokpitte değildi.
exercises.answer: The captain wasn't in the cockpit yesterday.

title: Simple Past Tense (Geçmiş Zaman) - Regular & Irregular Verbs
explanation:
**Düzenli Fiiller (Regular):** Fiil + ed (worked, arrived, pushed)
**Düzensiz Fiiller (Irregular):** Kökten değişir (go -> went, fly -> flew, see -> saw)

**Olumsuz (Negative):** Subject + didn't + Verb(yalın) (I didn't fly.)
**Soru (Question):** Did + Subject + Verb(yalın)? (Did you take off?)

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- The plane landed 5 minutes ago. (Uçak 5 dakika önce indi)
- We flew from Istanbul to London. (İstanbul'dan Londra'ya uçtuk)
aviationContext: Uçuş loglarında veya kule iletişiminde geçmiş manevralar için çok önemlidir: 'We climbed to 30,000 feet.'

exercises.question: The airplane ___ (land) safely an hour ago.
Did the pilot checked the engines?
exercises.answer: Did the pilot check the engines?

title: Can / Can't (Yetenek ve İzin)
description: Bir şeyi yapabilme yeteneğini, güncel ihtimali veya izin durumlarını belirtir.
explanation:
**Olumlu:** I can fly this plane. (Bu uçağı uçurabilirim)
**Olumsuz:** We can't (cannot) take off in this weather. (Bu havada kalkış yapamayız)
**Soru:** Can you see the runway? (Pisti görebiliyor musun?)

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- Can I have your passport, please? (Pasaportunuzu alabilir miyim?)
- Passengers can't use their phones during takeoff. (Yolcular kalkış sırasında telefonlarını kullanamazlar.)
aviationContext: İzin isterken veya ATC'ye bir durumu doğrularken sıkça kullanılır: 'Tower, we cannot see the runway/traffic.'

exercises.question: We ___ see the runway because of the fog.
He can to fly a helicopter.

title: Has / Have Got (Sahiplik)
description: Bir şeye sahip olmayı (var/yok) belirtmek için kullanılır.
explanation:
**Yapı:** I/You/We/They have got (I've got) | He/She/It has got (He's got)
**Olumsuz:** haven't got / hasn't got
**Soru:** Have you got...? / Has he got...?

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- We have got enough fuel for the trip. (Seyahat için yeterli yakıtımız var.)
- Has she got a boarding pass? (Onun biniş kartı var mı?)
aviationContext: Yolcu durumları, evrak kontrolü veya uçak donanımından bahsederken kullanılır: 'We have got a problem with the left engine.'

exercises.question: The captain ___ a map of the route.

title: There is / There are (Var/Yok)
description: Bir nesnenin veya kişinin bir yerde mevcut olduğunu belirtir.
explanation:
**Tekiller/Sayılamayanlar için:** There is (There's) a storm ahead.
**Çoğullar için:** There are 150 passengers on board.
**Olumsuz:** There isn't a problem. / There aren't many clouds.
**Soru:** Is there a doctor on board? / Are there any questions?

**Havacılık Örnekleri:**
- There is heavy traffic at the airport. (Havalimanında yoğun trafik var)
- There are two pilots in the cockpit. (Kokpitte iki pilot var)
aviationContext: Uçak içi veya dışındaki durumları yolculara veya kuleye bildirirken kullanılır: 'There is some turbulence ahead.'

exercises.question: Uçakta bir doktor var mı?
exercises.answer: Is there a doctor on the plane?

exercises.question: There is two engines on the Boeing 737.
exercises.answer: There are two engines on the Boeing 737.
